title: LabTrust Evidence Bundle Manifest v0.1
description: Manifest for EvidenceBundle.v0.1: files with sha256, policy_fingerprint, optional signature.

tool_registry_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 digest of tool registry (B010); policy_fingerprint may incorporate this.

coordination_audit_digest_sha256.description: SHA-256 of canonical digest (step_id, proposal_hash, shield_outcome_hash) from episode log for verification.

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature: algorithm, public_key_b64, signature_b64, key_id
